suggestions: For tasks tagged mcpkit/rdcycle, the agent should immediately check ../mcpkit path and note the cross-repo constraint
Consider adding a maintenance_mode flag to rdcycle.CycleConfig that can be set from claudekit's NewRDCycleModule
The perpetual orchestrator in mcpkit should check AllPhasesComplete() before calling HandlePlan/HandleSynthesize
what_failed: Spent 10+ iterations re-reading the same claudekit files trying to find rdcycle orchestrator code that lives in ../mcpkit
Could not directly modify mcpkit files from claudekit project scope
what_worked: Identified that t8-maintenance-mode requires changes in mcpkit/rdcycle (sibling repo), not claudekit
The rdcycle_plan tool already identifies when all phases are complete (gap_count=0) which provides the signal needed for maintenance mode
Existing AllPhasesComplete() check in rdcycle planner already supports this pattern
